candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related depreciation line, but it appears directly beneath the selected total COGS row and alongside the balancing value, indicating it is a component already embedded in the selected parent bucket 'Cost of goods sold'.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is another explicit COGS-related depreciation component beneath the selected COGS total, so adding it separately would double count relative to the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold'.
This looks like a possible summary label for COGS D&A, but it is unpopulated in the excerpt and therefore should not be used.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is the total row 'Cost of goods sold'. The visible COGS D&A rows are presented as components beneath that total together with a balancing row, so they appear already included in the selected COGS bucket. No separate same-level populated COGS D&A row should be added.

candidates.why: This label appears beneath both 'Selling expenses' and 'Administrative expenses' as a component of those selected parent rows, so it is already embedded in the selected XSGA bucket and should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This appears beneath both selling and administrative totals as a component of the selected XSGA rows, so it should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is a D&A component under the selected 'Development expenses' row. Since 'Development expenses' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, adding this separately would be unnecessary and risks distortion under the special R&D rule.
This is a child component under the selected 'Development expenses' total, which is already present in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so it should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is another child component of the selected 'Development expenses' total and should not be added separately, especially because Development expenses is already handled in both XSGA and XRD.
This looks like a possible summary row, but it is unpopulated in the excerpt and therefore should not be used.
This looks like a possible summary row, but it is unpopulated in the excerpt and should not be used. Also, Development expenses is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the sum of 'Selling expenses', 'Administrative expenses', and 'Development expenses'. The visible D&A lines sit beneath those selected totals with balancing rows, indicating they are already embedded in the selected parent buckets. The blank summary labels 'Depreciation/Amortization in SGA' and 'Depreciation/Amortization in R&D' are not populated. Because 'Development expenses' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, R&D-related D&A should not be added separately.
